properties.body:
[Southern Baltic] DANISH NAV WARN 232/26
DENMARK. BALTIC SEA. BORNHOLM TO DK/PL
EEZ.
12 AND 13 MAY 2026, 1200 - 1400 UTC,
MILITARY EXERCISE IN AREA.
1) 55-02.3N 015-18.6E.
2) 54-54.0N 014-53.5E.
3) 54-34.4N 015-12.6E.
4) 54-34.5N 015-13.6E.
5) 54-35.3N 015-18.9E.
6) 54-37.3N 015-29.0E.
7) 54-39.1N 015-34.4E.
8) 54-40.9N 015-39.6E.
LIVE ORDNANCE WILL BE USED.
MILITARY GUARD VESSELS VHF CH 16.
MARINERS ARE ADVISED TO STAY WELL CLEAR.
